text:
lizard@freemail.gr wrote:

> > My CPU is Cyrix

Please describe in detail.  Also, if you can recompile a kernel with

	options		DDB

line in your kernel configuration file, please type

	show cyrixreg

and

	trace

when you get panic.


> Fatal trap 1: privileged instruction fault while in kernel mode

Is it always trap 1?
